tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Saving All My Love For You

recommended.version_description: This version includes the guitar part for the chords you hear from the keyboard. Based of the studio song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PItbZklYYNQ.

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends

content:
Saving all my love for you   (midi)
 
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]
 [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
1. A few stolen moments is all that we share,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
    you've got your family, and they need you there.[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
    Though I've tried to resist, being last on your list,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]B7[/ch]
    but no other man's gonna do,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]
    so I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]
 
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
2. It's not very easy, living all alone,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
    my friends try and tell me, find a man of my own.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
    But each time I try, I just break down and cry ,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]    - [ch]B7[/ch]
    'cause I'd rather be home feeling blue,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
    So I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]
 
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                                       [ch]Em[/ch]
    You used to tell me we'd run away together,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
    love gives you the right to be free.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Db[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
    You said, be patient, just wait a little longer,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]D7[/ch]
    but that's just an old fantasy.[/tab]
 
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
3. I've got to get ready, just a few minutes more,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
    gonna get that old feeling, when you walk through that door,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
    for tonight is the night, for feeling alright,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]    - [ch]B7[/ch]
    we'll be making love the whole night through.[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
    So I'm saving all my love, yes, I'm saving all my love,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]
    yes, I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]
 
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
4. No other woman, is gonna love you more,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
    'cause tonight is the night, that I'm feeling alright,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]     - [ch]B7[/ch]
    we'll be making love the whole night through.[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
    So I'm saving all my love, yeah, I'm saving all my love,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]
    yes I'm saving all my love for yo....u,             [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]  - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]
    for yo....u,                        for yo....u ....[/tab]
 
(capo 2nd)
